case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. SANDRA D. EVANS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
